name_en: Goyard Single-Sided Mini Shopping Bag, Saint Louis mini bag. This versatile mini basket features an ultra-light weight and large capacity to meet all daily needs. A classic French style that is versatile and chic! Dimensions: Opening 28cm, Base 20*H 20*Base Width 10cm
